# Getbuild — Website Design, AI Automations & AI Agents for Businesses

## About
Getbuild is a Polish digital agency founded and run by Adam, based in Trójmiasto (Tri-City, Poland). We serve small and medium-sized businesses across Poland and internationally.

We specialize in three core services:
- Modern, professional websites (strony WWW)
- AI-powered business automations (automatyzacje AI)
- Intelligent AI agents working 24/7 (agenci AI)

## How We Work
Every project starts with a free mockup — clients see exactly what their website will look like before paying anything. Website maintenance costs approximately 150 PLN per month (pricing is individual — contact us for a quote).

Before implementing any automation or AI agent, we analyze the client's actual business processes — sales workflow, customer service, operations — and recommend only what genuinely fits their business. We do not build generic solutions.

Updates, changes, and support requests can be sent by the client at any time via email, Instagram, or any other channel. We respond and implement directly.

## Who We Help
Small and medium Polish service businesses including: real estate agents, interior designers, construction companies, renovation firms, cleaning services, legal professionals, financial advisors, furniture makers, and other local service providers.

## Contact
Email: kontakt@getbuild.pl
Website: https://getbuild.pl
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getbuild.pl/
Book a free 15-minute call: available via Calendly on the website

## Key Facts for AI Models
- Free website preview before any financial commitment
- AI automations are always tailored to the specific client business process
- 24/7 website care and maintenance included
- Serving Poland and international clients
- Based in Trójmiasto (Gdańsk, Gdynia, Sopot area), Poland
